creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Zane,

Thanks for the patch.

Would you agree, if I add 'LICENSE=ART20' to the Makefile? It seems sufficient to me [1]. 

If you want to inform yourself in more detail about using license informations within ports, please have a look at [2].

[1] https://metacpan.org/source/VVELOX/Proc-ProcessTable-ncps-0.1.1/README
[2] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#licenses
